title: An Nuhūd Heat Wave
lead: An Nuhūd is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.29. The temperature has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in An Nuhūd has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 10.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 46% and the wind speed is moderate at 11.0 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave is expected to continue with no relief in sight, posing a significant threat to the city's infrastructure and residents.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
